headline: Fortinet Returns to Join Global Leaders at the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting on Cybersecurity 2026
summary: Fortinet contributes to public-private collaboration efforts to strengthen global cyber resilience and disrupt cybercrime at scale across cyber frontiersSUNNYVALE, Calif., April 29, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- News SummaryFortinet® (NASDAQ: FTNT), the global cybersecurity leader driving the convergence of networking and security, today announced it will return to participate in the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting on Cybersecurity 2026, this year taking place May 4–6 in Geneva, Switzerland, and
